title: For those who missed the Workshop
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone! Last week I've made a post about the workshop where me and my friend Gabriel would show how to create AI strategy that outperforms SP500 using [Alpha Builder](https://builder.limex.com/). Many people showed interest, but not everyone could attempt on November 6th. So if you missed it, here is the link to webinar recording in Zoom (it will ask you to register in order to access it) - [link](https://us06web.zoom.us/rec/play/Pu_lqQmWrivCz_UzfYDKMB-w1-gfe9_p8XPnj33x-5_QkmPMek_mpsMYH2v7y52ccpG2RHMQhOHx600-.2a0Uut-6hVgaLW3f?eagerLoadZvaPages=sidemenu.billing.plan_management&isReferralProgramEnabled=false&isReferralProgramAvailable=false&accessLevel=meeting&canPlayFromShare=true&from=my_recording&startTime=1762455611000&componentName=rec-play&originRequestUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fus06web.zoom.us%2Frec%2Fshare%2FIxIHkTHRZAWLwbQA77GomOipCMnlaFLnYMNJPo6XKthTCNcudSxGFA_oLIYOoacN.1ZKFRmelbkhfzqZg%3FstartTime%3D1762455611000%2520Passcode%3A%2520a%247eE4%23%2B) and passcode is: a$7eE4#+

Here is what we've covered during the workshop:

**Three core use cases****How the engine works (high level)****How to actually trade the outputs** (Gabriel’s part)**Ranking tools inside the app**
